message:
test: add bv package test suite for helpers, cache, and pure client

Three new test files for the bv (beads viewer) package:

1. bv_helpers_test.go - Helper function validation:
   - TestCheckDrift_EarlyValidation: Missing project/beads dir handling
   - TestGetBeadsSummary_EarlyValidation: Invalid path handling
   - Edge cases for drift detection without baseline data

2. client_cache_test.go - Cache layer tests:
   - Cache invalidation behavior
   - TTL expiration handling
   - Concurrent access patterns
   - Cache hit/miss metrics

3. client_pure_test.go - Pure client tests:
   - Read-only operations without side effects
   - Query parameter validation
   - Response parsing edge cases
   - Error handling for malformed data

All tests use t.Parallel() for faster execution and t.TempDir()
for isolated test fixtures.

Also includes bead tracker metadata updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
